title: Object Detection, from Boxes Up
tagline: IoU, anchors, NMS, and confidence — all the pieces you draw yourself
summary: Drag ground-truth and predicted boxes on a real scene and watch IoU recompute. Tune a confidence threshold and see precision and recall swap places. Run non-max suppression by hand. Every number is computed live on whichever scene you pick.
highlights: Drag two boxes and watch Intersection-over-Union recompute from area formulas.
Tune a confidence threshold and see precision, recall, and F1 shift in lockstep.
Run non-max suppression yourself: watch redundant boxes vanish as IoU thresholds bite.
Click across five scenes (single cat, crowded pedestrians, cars, overlapping fruit, a drawn scene) and compare detection difficulty.
